design_system.name: GlasEditionsLab - The Modern Quill
design_system.description: A rich, elegant, and distraction-free design system for AI book generation. Merges the physicality of paper with the magic of AI.

usage.background: Warm cream/paper tone, NEVER pure white #FFFFFF for main bg
usage.primary: Used for 'Generate', 'Create', and primary actions. Bronze/Gold tone.

textures.paper_grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-serif tracking-wide shadow-sm transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-8 rounded-sm font-medium

cards.base: bg-card border border-stone-100 shadow-card p-8 rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-lg shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 font-serif
inputs.idea_input: min-h-[120px] text-xl md:text-2xl leading-relaxed border-none bg-stone-50/50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-0 resize-none placeholder:text-stone-300 placeholder:italic

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a 'Rich' SaaS. Avoid the sterile 'Stripe-clone' look. Think 'New York Times' meets 'Notion'. Use the provided colors to override the default Shadcn slate/zinc palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: Use the 'Tetris' grid (Mode A). The Hero section should feel like opening a high-end book. Use the 'hero_background' image with a soft overlay. Typography must be massive (Playfair Display).
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: The dashboard is the 'Writer's Studio'. It should feel calm. Use the 'texture_abstract' as a very subtle background pattern (opacity 0.03) on the main content area. The progress of book generation should be visualized as pages filling up or a chapter list growing, not just a linear progress bar.
instructions_to_main_agent.book_preview: This is the core value. The reading view must be impeccable. Use 'Merriweather' font, generous margins (max-w-prose), and a slightly warmer background (#FFF) than the app background to simulate a page.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Customize Shadcn components. Remove default rounded-md and use rounded-sm. Change focus rings to the Primary Gold/Bronze color. Use 'sonner' for toasts (e.g., 'Chapter 3 Generated').

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
